headline: Target Corporation (TGT) PT Lifted to $120 at JPMorgan After Q4 Results
summary: We recently compiled a list of the 12 Top Performing Consumer Staples Stocks in February. Target Corporation (NYSE:TGT) is among the best performing stocks. TheFly reported on March 5 that JPMorgan increased its price target on TGT to $120 from $115 and retains a Neutral rating on the shares. The firm revised its internal model […]

headline: Target opens 5 new stores, with No. 2000 located in North Carolina
summary: Target is opening 30 stores in 2026. Five open the weekend of March 15, two in California and one each in Missouri, North Carolina and Texas.

headline: Walmart, Target outpace peers in AI-driven supply chain race, Jefferies says
summary: Investing.com -- Generative AI is rapidly reshaping the operational landscape of the U.S. retail sector, offering a tangible path to margin expansion through supply chain and inventory efficiencies even as "discovery risks" loom for laggards.
